scenarios.title: Data Orchestration and Parallel Computing
scenarios.when_to_read: Workflow engines, DAGs, assets, Snakefiles, lazy/parallel task graphs, distributed arrays/dataframes, feature stores, cloud compute orchestration, and production data pipelines.
scenarios.role: Use this repo skill for Dask, the Python parallel computing library, when working with lazy task graphs, schedulers, Dask Array, Dask DataFrame, Dask Bag/bytes IO, configuration, diagnostics, CLI usage, or contributor validation.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `dask` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: array workflows, bag bytes workflows, configuration diagnostics cli, core graphs schedulers, and dataframe workflows.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `dask` when the request names `dask`, centers on Dask, the Python parallel computing library, when working with lazy task graphs, schedulers, Dask Array, Dask DataFrame, Dask Bag/bytes IO, configuration, diagnostics, CLI usage, or contributor validation, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in data orchestration and parallel computing. Then route to array workflows, bag bytes workflows, configuration diagnostics CLI, or core graphs schedulers when those focused workflows match.
